slogans: Reset your mind. This is a new point.
Let go of the pressure. Breathe.
Reset your focus. One point at a time.
Clear the pressure. Find your calm.
Reset your energy. You're in control.
Let the pressure go. Start fresh.
Clear your thoughts. Focus on now.
Let go of stress. Find your rhythm.
Reset your confidence. You've got this.
Let the moment go. Create a new one.
Reset your game. Show your best.
